prerequisites.value: Catch Off-Guard or Throw Anything, Shikigami Style.

description.value: **Benefit:** While in Shikigami Style, you can take a â2 penalty on attack rolls to treat an improvised weapon as if it had one of the following weapon special qualities until the start of your next turn: blocking, brace, disarm, distracting, nonlethal, performance, or trip. If the weapon has the fragile special quality or broken condition, you can treat it as if it had the jagged special quality.
